defects.name: Seam Breakage / Open Seam
defects.description: Complete seam failure where stitching has come undone, exposing garment interior or causing structural weakness.
defects.corrective_action: HALT PRODUCTION — Investigate root cause, check needle/thread tension, re-stitch affected units.

defects.name: Needle Hole / Fabric Puncture
defects.description: Visible needle holes in fabric from incorrect needle size or damaged needles.
defects.corrective_action: HALT — Replace needles, check needle plate, reject affected units.

sewing.check: Check for visible punctures around seam lines

defects.name: Color Bleeding / Migration
defects.description: Dye from one fabric area transfers to adjacent areas, especially in multi-color garments.
defects.corrective_action: HALT — Isolate affected lot, test dye fastness, reject non-conforming materials.

pre_production.check: Wet rub test on all color combinations

defects.name: Skipped Stitches
defects.description: Machine skips stitches, creating weak points in the seam that may fail under stress.
defects.corrective_action: Rework — Re-stitch affected seam. Check machine timing and thread tension.

defects.name: Incorrect Label Placement
defects.description: Care label, size label, or brand label placed in wrong position or orientation.
defects.corrective_action: Rework — Remove and re-attach label in correct position per tech pack.

finishing.check: Check label position against tech pack spec

defects.name: Measurement Out of Tolerance
defects.description: Key measurement exceeds ±1/2 inch tolerance from spec sheet.
defects.corrective_action: Rework if possible, reject if beyond rework tolerance. Adjust patterns.

finishing.check: Full measurement check per size spec

defects.name: Fabric Defect (Hole / Tear / Snag)
defects.description: Visible hole, tear, or snag in fabric affecting garment appearance or function.
defects.corrective_action: Reject unit — Cannot be reworked if in visible area.

cutting.check: Inspect fabric roll for defects before cutting

defects.name: Zipper Malfunction
defects.description: Zipper does not open/close smoothly, jams, or separates under normal use.
defects.corrective_action: Replace zipper and re-stitch. Check zipper supplier quality.

defects.name: Loose Thread / Untrimmed Thread
defects.description: Visible loose or untrimmed thread ends on exterior or interior of garment.
defects.corrective_action: Trim threads. Conditional accept if ≤ AQL 4.0 limit.

defects.name: Minor Shade Variation
defects.description: Slight color difference between panels within acceptable tolerance (Grade 3.5+ on grey scale).
defects.corrective_action: Conditional accept. Note on report. Review with buyer if borderline.

defects.name: Minor Alignment Issue
defects.description: Slight misalignment of patterns, stripes, or plaids within 3mm tolerance.
defects.corrective_action: Conditional accept within tolerance. Flag for pattern marker review.

sewing.check: Check pattern matching at seam lines

defects.name: Wrinkle / Crease Mark
defects.description: Non-permanent wrinkle or crease mark on garment surface from handling or packing.
defects.corrective_action: Steam press before packing. Note on report.

defects.name: Chalk / Marker Residue
defects.description: Visible chalk marks or marker lines from pattern marking not fully removed.
defects.corrective_action: Clean with appropriate solvent or brush. Note on report.
